passive.name: Night Hunter
passive.description: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers, gaining Move Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Vayne}} gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing a nearby enemy champion, significantly increased during ''{{ai|Final Hour|Vayne}}''.
wiki_detail.blurb4: |description  = {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Vayne''' gains {{sti|ms|{{as|30 '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing a nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy champion, increased to {{as|90|ms}} while under the effects of ''{{ai|Final Hour|Vayne}}''.
wiki_detail.notes: * The '''bonus''' movement speed persists for 2 seconds after '''Vayne''' loses {{tip|sight}} of an enemy champion.

Q.name: Tumble
Q.description: Vayne tumbles, maneuvering to carefully place her next shot. Her next attack deals bonus damage.
Q.tooltip:
Vayne rolls a short distance, and deals an additional {{ adratiobonus }} physical damage on her next Attack.

This Ability triggers spell effects upon dealing damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vayne}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} in the target direction. Her next basic attack within a few seconds will deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vayne''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} a fixed distance in the target direction, though not through terrain, and empowers her next [[basic attack]] within 3 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancelable windup}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The bonus damage applies {{stil|life steal}}.
* Although ''Tumble'' will reset the basic attack timer, '''Vayne''' cannot attack until the animation is complete.
* '''Vayne''' can cast {{ai|Final Hour|Vayne}} during ''Tumble''. She does not become {{tip|invisible}} during the dash.

W.name: Silver Bolts
W.description: Vayne tips her bolts with a rare metal, toxic to evil things. The third consecutive attack or ability against the same target deals a percentage of the target's max health as bonus true damage.
W.tooltip: Passive: Every third consecutive Attack or Ability against an enemy deals an additional {{ totaldamage }} max Health true damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Vayne}} basic attacks and ''{{ai|Condemn|Vayne}}'' will apply a stack of ''Silver Bolts'', which expires upon attacking a new enemy.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The third stack will consume them all to deal {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Vayne's''' [[basic attacks]] {{tip|on-hit}} and ''{{ai|Condemn|Vayne}}'' apply a [[stack]] of ''Silver Bolts'' for {{fd|3.5}} seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications, expiring upon attacking a new enemy, and stacking up to 3 times.
wiki_detail.description2: The third stack consumes them all to deal {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' true damage}}|td}}, with a minimum threshold. This damage is capped at 200 against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus True Damage|{{as|{{ap|6 to 10}}% of target's '''maximum''' health}}}}<!--
-->{{st|Minimum Bonus Damage|{{ap|50 to 110}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* [[Stack]]s are not removed if '''Vayne''' switches to attacking a target immune to ''Silver Bolts'' ({{tip|turret|structures}}, {{tip|ward|wards}}).
* ''Silver Bolts'' do not apply to additional targets with {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}}.
* The stacks can be consumed even if the target is in {{tip|stasis}}.
* The attacks do not affect [[structures]] nor [[ward]]s.

E.name: Condemn
E.description: Vayne draws a heavy crossbow from her back, and fires a huge bolt at her target, knocking them back and dealing damage. If they collide with terrain, they are impaled, dealing bonus damage and stunning them.
E.tooltip: Vayne fires a bolt that Knocks Back and deals {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. If the target collides with terrain, they take {{ empowereddamagett }} bonus physical damage and become Stunned for {{ stunduration }} seconds. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vayne}} fires a heavy bolt at the target enemy that deals {{as|physical damage}} and {{tip|airborne|knocks them back}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the target hits [[terrain]], they are briefly {{tip|stun|stunned}} and dealt {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vayne''' fires a heavy bolt at the target enemy that deals {{as|physical damage}} and {{tip|airborne|knocks them back}} 475 units, though not through terrain.
wiki_detail.description2: If the target collides with [[terrain]], they take {{ccs|{{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}|physical}} and become {{tip|stun|stunned}} for {{ap|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|50*1.5 to 190*1.5}} {{as|(+ 75% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|50*2.5 to 190*2.5}} {{as|(+ 125% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Condemn's'' {{tip|airborne|displacement}} direction is determined at the end of the cast time.
** Because of this, '''Vayne''' may use {{si|Flash}} during the cast time to create a better angle.
* {{tip|Cleanse|Cleansing}} the {{tip|airborne|knock back}} will also end the displacement early.
* The [[spell indicator]] for this ability also displays the direction for the knock back relative to '''Vayne's''' position.
* ''Condemn's'' {{tip|stun}} duration starts when '''Vayne's''' target collides with a wall (they can be immobilized for up to 2 seconds depending on {{tip|airborne|displacement}} duration based on distance traveled).
* ''Condemn's'' missile will fail to fire if '''Vayne''' is {{tip|suppression|suppressed}} during the cast time.{{bug|2}}
* ''Condemn'' can interact with [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

R.name: Final Hour
R.description: Readying herself for an epic confrontation, Vayne gains increased Attack Damage, Invisibility during Tumble, reduced Tumble cooldown, and more bonus Move Speed from Night Hunter
R.tooltip: Vayne gains {{ bonusattackdamage }} Attack Damage for {{ baseduration }} seconds, extended by {{ durationtoadd }} seconds whenever a champion damaged by Vayne dies within {{ damagedmarkerduration }} seconds. Additionally, during the duration:Night Hunter instead grants {{ movementspeed }} Move Speed.The Cooldown of Tumble is reduced by {{ tumblecdreduction }}%, and grants Invisibility for {{ tumblestealthduration }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vayne}} equips her crossbow for a long duration, gaining {{sti|{{as|attack damage}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: During ''Final Hour'', ''{{ai|Night Hunter|Vayne}}'' grants increased {{sti|{{as|movement speed}}}}, and {{ai|Tumble|Vayne}} is empowered to have a {{sti|cdr|reduced}} cooldown and grant '''Vayne''' {{tip|invisibility}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vayne''' equips her crossbow, gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} for a duration.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Effect Duration|{{ap|8 to 12}} seconds}}
{{st|Bonus Attack Damage|{{ap|25 to 55 3}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: While active, ''Final Hour'' empowers ''{{ai|Night Hunter|Vayne}}'' to have tripled {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} and ''{{ai|Tumble|Vayne}}'' to have a reduced {{sti|cooldown}}. Additionally, ''{{ais|Tumble|Vayne}}'' cast grants '''Vayne''' {{tip|invisibility}} for 1 second. Attacking or casting abilities ends the stealth immediately.
wiki_detail.description3: Scoring an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}} within 3 seconds of damaging them will extend ''Final Hour's'' duration by 4 seconds, up to its original duration.
wiki_detail.spellshield:
|notes        = 
* '''Vayne's''' animations and basic attack projectiles change slightly during ''Final Hour''.
* ''Tumble's'' visual effects can be seen by enemies upon '''Vayne''' becoming invisible.
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.
